violations.text: (Dough ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2025

The cutting boards in the (front prep area ) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (rolling pins) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
Inspector observed ham be stored in walk in exceeding 7 days datemarking. PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (bakers racks and prep table shelves ) have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
The (tiles and coving ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed damaged tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (dough mixer, dough scraper, and knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
Walk in freezer in located in the basement area was not in good repair. Observed handle being held in place by a screwdriver. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves in the walk in freezer have an accumulation of ice buildup. No food product was in contact with ice. PIC covered food product. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
